title: hymenophyllum abruptum
intro: Hymenophyllum abruptum, also known as abrupt fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. The medicinal properties of Hymenophyllum abruptum have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of fever and skin irritations.
